source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Laser Blasts
upgrades.description: Shoots powerful blasts of laser instead of darts.

upgrades.name: Plasma Blasts
upgrades.description: Plasma vaporizes almost everything it touches.

upgrades.name: Sun Avatar
upgrades.description: Channels power from the core of the Sun.

upgrades.name: Sun Temple
upgrades.description: Tower sacrifices enhance and modify the Temple's attacks.

upgrades.name: True Sun God
upgrades.description: Tremble before the AWESOME power of the TRUE Sun God!!

upgrades.name: Epic Range
upgrades.description: Why settle for super when you can have EPIC?

upgrades.name: Robo Monkey
upgrades.description: Half Super Monkey, half killer robot of death. Shoots from 2 guns at once and can crit!

upgrades.name: Tech Terror
upgrades.description: Annihilation ability: Destroys most Bloons completely and utterly within blast radius.

upgrades.name: Knockback
upgrades.description: Bloons get pushed backwards or slowed after each hit.

upgrades.name: Ultravision
upgrades.description: Enables Super Monkey to shoot slightly further, see and do more damage to Camo Bloons.

upgrades.name: Dark Knight
upgrades.description: Dark blades increase knockback and pierce and deal extra damage to MOAB-class Bloons. Gains Darkshift ability to shift to a nearby location.

upgrades.name: Dark Champion
upgrades.description: Champion's dark blades excel at puncturing and ruining all Bloon types. Darkshift ability extends mapwide.

upgrades.name: Legend of the Night
upgrades.description: We turn to him, when all hope is lost...
